subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thou hast opened the gates of reunion unto them that dwell upon Thy earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به فتحت ابواب اللقا علی من فی ارضک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @naming of children; of individuals
